source: InfoGAN- Interpretable Representation Learning by Information Maximizing Generative Adversarial Nets .pdf

concepts.finding: InfoGAN maximizes mutual information between a small subset of latent variables and the generator output, learning interpretable and disentangled representations without supervision.
concepts.implication: Maximizing mutual information between latent codes and outputs yields interpretable representations without labels, directly applicable to learning interpretable query representations.
concepts.open_question: Can InfoGAN-style mutual information maximization learn interpretable dimensions (commercial vs. informational intent) in query embeddings without intent labels?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: An InfoGAN-style objective will learn query embeddings with interpretable dimensions correlating with human-judged intent categories at r > 0.7 without any intent labels.
